rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF IN RE REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST AGREEMENT OF CHARLES ACTIS/CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NO. PES-05-287457
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Respondent Eva Knott To Respond Further To Interr. And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Carol Mitchell's Motion For Order To Compel Respondent Eva Knott To Respond Further To Interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is denied as to Interrogatory Nos. 22-34 and 37 as they are irrelevant. The motion is denied as to Nos. 35 and 36 as they are irrelevant and privileged. The motion is granted as to No. 38. The objections are overruled and ordered strickent. The response is incomplete. A further response shall be made within 10 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. (612/EAH)
